analysis.name: Tutorial
analysis.summary: TUT是BNB Chain上的教育主题Meme币，近期因币安上线及社区热度上涨，但市值较低、流动性集中在DEX，波动风险高。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破0.008美元或成交量持续萎缩

catalysts: 币安上线TUT并开放交易对

latestNews.title: Binance Adds Tutorial (TUT) on Earn, Buy Crypto, Convert & Margin
latestNews.reason: 币安上线提升流动性和曝光度

latestNews.title: Binance Announced the First Batch of Vote to List Results and Will List TUT
latestNews.reason: 社区投票上线，显示用户基础

latestNews.title: Tutorial Price Prediction: Will TUT Coin Reach $1?
latestNews.reason: 预测类文章，无实质影响

fundamentals: 项目起源于开发者10个月前在BNB Chain上发布的教学代币，后转为Meme币
总供应量10亿，当前流通8.34亿，无锁仓
已在PancakeSwap建立流动性，并完成four.meme的bonding curve
marketRead: 24小时涨幅10.3%，但7日涨幅9.4%，波动较大
成交量516万美元，相对市值较高，换手率约56%
价格距历史高点0.17美元下跌93%，处于低位
risks: Meme币高度依赖社区情绪，缺乏实际价值支撑
流动性集中在DEX，存在滑点和操纵风险
币安上线后可能面临获利盘抛压
项目方身份不明，合约风险未知
watchlist: 是否有新CEX上线或做市商支持
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinMarketCap和DexScreener，部分新闻为聚合来源
市场数据为2026-06-25快照，价格可能已变化

profile.name: Tutorial
profile.description: Tutorial is a token from a dev who made a tutorial on how to launch token on BNB chain 10 month ago, the OG Tutorial token was on testnet, so he decided to launch it on mainnet as a meme. The purpose of the project is to promote building on bsc and making useful education content. The project was originally created on four.meme and liquidity was transferred to pancakeswap as bonding curve criteria was met.
